features_implemented: Three-tier visualization dashboard (Population S-Curve/Delta, Per-Capita Rates Intersection, Total Births/Deaths Convergence)
2D HTML5 Canvas Habitat Visualizer with organic bouncing particles
Age-based color transition for canvas organisms (Green at birth transitioning gradually to Red at max age)
Resilient offline Canvas graph drawing fallback when Chart.js is unavailable
instructions_for_future_agents: When working in this repository, always read this context file first. Make sure git operations use the configured GitHub repository. To push updates, use: git add . && git commit -m '<message>' && git push origin main
